_comment: Species: Ghost Face Beast (鬼面兽) from A Will Eternal. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Ghost Face Beast

canonical.appearance: Beast 5 m, face is a screaming ghost, body shadow-wreathed
canonical.size: 5 m adult, 2000 jin; ancient 15 m, 40000 jin
canonical.behavior: Hunts by fear; cultivates by consuming terror
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: ghost_face_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
